judgment.summary: Amazon features high-velocity earnings growth and a massive cash position.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.78 beat the 1.65 estimate by 68.2%, with the next earnings date on 2026-07-30.
positives: Earnings growth is exceptional at 74.8% YoY and 76.7% quarterly.
Total cash reserves are significant at $143.09B.
Return on equity is strong at 24.3%.
Analyst consensus is a strong_buy with a mean target of $311.55.
negatives: Total debt of $235.54B outweighs the $143.09B cash on hand.
Quick ratio of 0.97 suggests limited immediate liquidity.
Beta of 1.47 implies higher-than-average price volatility.

news.paragraph: Amazon is seeing positive momentum from its AI-focused investments and a recent price target upgrade to $310 by Arete Research. Traders should weigh this against a lawsuit regarding tariff-related price increases and prepare for potential volatility surrounding upcoming earnings. The stock is also currently approaching a major $3 trillion market capitalization milestone.

headlines.title: Amazon's Big Rally Takes A Breather Just Short Of $3 Trillion Club. What To Watch Next.
